programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Years after Ingrid and Martha's career paths diverged, their paths meet again. 2024. Spain, United States. Director: Pedro Almodovar. Starring: Julianne Moore, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: Sylvia's simple life becomes complicated when Saul follows her home from their highschool reunion. 2023. Mexico, USA. Director: Michel Franco. Starring: Jessica Chastain, Peter Sarsgaard.

programme.title: Tata
programme.desc: A moldovian journalist recieves an alarming video from her father, uncovering a generational pattern of domestic violence. 2024. Romania, Germany, Netherlands. Director: Lina Vdovii, Radu Ciorniciuc.

programme.title: Play
programme.desc: A group of pre-teens conduct around 40 robberies using gang roleplay instead of physical violence. 2011. Sweden, France. Director: Ruben Ostlund. Starring: Anas Abdirahman, Sebastian Blyckert.

programme.title: Return Home
programme.desc: A newly-divorced man returns to his hometown to see his brother and sister-in-law. 1990. Australia. Director: Ray Argall. Starring: Dennis Coard, Frankie J. Holden.

programme.title: A Fire Within
programme.desc: After surviving torture in their home country, three woman flee to the US. However, it seems their past has followed them. 2022. United States. Director: Christopher Chambers.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: An estranged father's re-enters the picture as a mother and three daughtersflee political tensions in Lima. 2024. Iceland. Director: Klaudia Reynicke. Starring: Abril Gjurinovic, Luana Vega.

programme.title: Two Tickets To Greece
programme.desc: Childhood friends reunite, and finally take their dream vacation to Greece. 2022. France. Director: Marc Fitoussi. Starring: Laure Calamy, Olivia Côte, Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: Evil Does Not Exist
programme.desc: A woodsman is inadvertently embroiled in plans to bring a high-end glamping retreat to his isolated village. 2023. Japan. Director: Ryusuke Hamaguchi. Starring: Hitoshi Omika.

programme.title: Splice Here: A Projected Odyssey
